---
title: LUQI Group
subtitle: Laboratory for Uncertainty Quantification and Inference
description: | 
  Department of Computer Science<br>
  University of Central Florida<br>
  Orlando, FL, USA<br>

  [[[GitHub]{.underline}](https://github.com/luqigroup)]

navbar: false
about:
  id: heading
  template: solana
  image: files/luqi-with-text.png
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 215px
---

:::{#heading}
:::


<!-- <div style="
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 10px 0; /* Adds vertical spacing without excessive whitespace */
">
  <span style="
    background-color: #fdfbd3;
    color: #373a3c;
    border: 1px solid #727475;
    padding: 6px;
    border-radius: 5px;
    display: inline-block;
    max-width: 100%;
    word-wrap: break-word;
    text-align: center;
  ">
    <strong>Reach out to [Ali Siahkoohi](http://alisiahkoohi.github.io/) if interested to join the LUQI group!</strong>
  </span>
</div> -->

## Research

Our research tackles **uncertainty quantification** in complex systems arising in computational science and engineering, with a focus on building **reliable, uncertainty-aware AI** systems. To this end, we develop methods that leverage tools like **generative models, variational inference, and hypernetworks** to characterize uncertainty in complex models at scale, with implications for **large-scale, PDE-based inverse problems**.

## Team

[Ali Siahkoohi](https://alisiahkoohi.github.io/) — Assistant Professor, CS \& ECE departments  
[Anirudh Thatipelli](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=siY4W9gAAAAJ) — PhD student, CS department  
[Davide Sabeddu](https://davide-sabeddu.github.io/Portfolio/) — PhD student, ECE department
